scope: Public, auditable Xiaohongshu brand-project retrospectives, service-provider/data-provider methods, operator workflows, and current official business pages.
purpose: Provide traceable, bounded production inputs for redbook-writing without turning agency claims or case outcomes into platform-algorithm facts.

url_check.pdf_exception: S01 returns HTTP 403 to command-line requests, but browser retrieval identifies and reads the official URL as a 52-page application/pdf.
url_check.canonicalization: Two retired xh.newrank.cn help URLs were replaced with accessible www.newrank.cn original-article URLs.

priority_order: named brand and agency project retrospectives with production steps
data-provider studies with sample scope or negative cases
operator SOPs used only as workflow hypotheses
current official commercial pages used only for present-day framing
excluded_source_types: course sales pages without course content
pirated course materials or unverified mirrors
guaranteed-viral claims without denominator or failure cases
generic title-template articles without production inputs

evidence_grades.A: Current official source; supports only the exact public statement or rule scope.
evidence_grades.B: Original joint report or well-described named case; supports bounded method/case observations, not universal causality.
evidence_grades.C: Agency self-report, data-provider case, or interview; supports conditional experience requiring local validation.
evidence_grades.D: Operator prescription, partial report, or under-specified case; supports workflow leads only.

source_records.title: 种草营销：第三种营销范式
source_records.author_org: 小红书 × 科特勒咨询集团
source_records.conflict_of_interest: A platform-commercial and consulting report designed partly to explain/promote seeding methodology.
can_support: the report's audience, demand, content-supply, Feeds/Search, organization, and measurement frameworks
bounded observations from named Yuze, BeBeBus, AMIRO, Gujia and other cases
the need to combine search, content, audience, product, and business evidence
cannot_support: the current 2026 recommendation algorithm
a universal fixed KPI or performance threshold
content-only causality for reported search or sales outcomes
one visual style as universally native or high-traffic

source_records.title: 用 KFS 跑通即时零售种草链路：朴朴超市项目复盘
source_records.author_org: IDEAinside 艾迪因赛 / 数英
source_records.conflict_of_interest: Agency case marketing with self-reported outcomes and paid-media involvement.
can_support: the project's product-selection, regional-audience, creator, first-screen, search, test, scale, and review workflow
the distinction between brand/category defense terms and scene expansion terms
the project's use of first image/title and early video frames as candidate attention variables
cannot_support: a universal CPE, CTR, CPC, or return-search threshold
natural-traffic causality
the claim that comment direction should be artificially manufactured

source_records.title: 618 投放复盘：有效爆文与无效爆文
source_records.conflict_of_interest: Proprietary data-tool provider demonstrating its own analysis framework.
can_support: a bounded distinction between public engagement and product-relevant discussion
the need to review content fit, creator fit, and paid amplification separately
anonymous negative cases in which attention leaked to another topic
cannot_support: comment keywords as proof of sales causality
the anonymous cases as representative of all categories
proprietary metrics as official platform definitions

source_records.title: 529 万篇家居内容观察
source_records.conflict_of_interest: Industry-media analysis; sample construction and platform data access are not fully disclosed.
can_support: historical home-category observations on product-share, transformation, and how-to carriers
reported trade-offs between save-friendly object content and creator memorability
creator-reported production considerations
cannot_support: current 2026 cross-category visual rules
the claim that all 5.29 million notes were manually analyzed
likes as a complete success metric

source_records.title: 零食博主访谈与品牌视角
source_records.conflict_of_interest: Editorial interviews and self-reported creator/brand experience; no controlled comparison.
can_support: food-category production practices involving held/opened products, real tasting, and specific pros and cons
brand-side consideration of account tone and organic-versus-commercial history
the potential trade-off between easy-to-copy no-face formats and creator/IP retention
cannot_support: a universal preference for handheld, low-production, or no-face imagery
single-account watch-time observations as cross-platform norms
causal performance attribution

source_records.title: 8840 篇素人种草复盘
source_records.author_org: 舒泽品牌手记 / 数英
source_records.conflict_of_interest: Self-reported service experience with lead-generation incentives and incomplete raw data.
can_support: reported failure modes of identical briefs, angles, photos, and AI-batched copy
conditional experience using real customers, scenes, user-language, and product-relevant interactions
a negative ethics case showing why source methods require tactic-level review
cannot_support: unsupported algorithm or shadow-limiting claims
the reported unit costs as general acquisition benchmarks
fake comments, sockpuppet accounts, prepared comparison pictures, or staggered false interactions

source_records.title: 品牌种草的叙事轴心
source_records.conflict_of_interest: Operator framework promoted through industry media; full report and performance evidence are not publicly visible on the page.
can_support: the existence and structure of the WHY-HOW-WHAT narrative-axis model
a hypothesis for checking long-term account and brand consistency
cannot_support: single-note traffic causality
the unviewed full report's case details
a requirement that every post repeat brand language

source_records.title: 家居品牌达人筛选案例
source_records.conflict_of_interest: Tool-provider client case; client and baseline are anonymous or under-specified.
can_support: a workflow lead for reviewing creator audience, content characteristics, prior collaborations, organic/commercial history, and collection status
cannot_support: the reported explosive-note-rate improvement as independently verified
a universal creator-selection threshold
content-quality causality

source_records.title: 小红书聚光
can_support: the exact current public case-card claims and product positioning visible at capture time
cannot_support: organic recommendation mechanics
case production steps not shown on the page
content-only causality for official case-card outcomes

source_records.title: 小红书商业开放平台
can_support: the current high-level user-product-demand-content-sharing commercial framing
cannot_support: a writing formula
an algorithm rule
fixed distribution or conversion thresholds

source_records.title: 小红书团队选题会 SOP
source_records.author_org: 林卿 LinQ / 青瓜传媒
source_records.conflict_of_interest: Individual operator prescription without an auditable client denominator or controlled results.
can_support: a hypothesis for data-prepared topic meetings, funnel diagnosis, scheduling, ownership, and replication-versus-innovation separation
cannot_support: fixed meeting cadence, duration, or innovation percentage
platform algorithm claims
performance guarantees

source_records.title: 小红书种草学
source_records.conflict_of_interest: Official training program and course directory.
can_support: the current existence of the official training portal and its public catalog
cannot_support: course methods not visible in the public catalog
any traffic formula
claims attributed to a listed instructor without course content

cases.name: 玉泽敏感肌需求分层与内容供给
production_mechanism: identify students as a core audience and repair as a rising demand
split broad sensitivity into oil-sensitive, dry-sensitive, red-sensitive and other visible states
map product answers and campus/dorm/exam scenes to each state
use expert creators plus user content, with a substantial short-video share
shift from broad category language toward state-specific problem terms
reported_outcomes: search volume reported as 17x
more than 20,000 UGC items and more than 10 million UGC views reported
e-commerce new-product ranking and GMV above 15 million reported
portable_lessons: one broad audience should not receive one undifferentiated answer
choose a carrier based on the evidence that must be shown

cases.name: BeBeBus 蝴蝶车用户语言共创
production_mechanism: conduct a prelaunch session with 13 expressive, high-frequency outing mothers
translate the brand term 保脊 into the visible user problem 宝宝坐车容易歪脖子
adopt the user-created, memorable nickname 蝴蝶车
carry scene, age, comfort, durability, content, search, and e-commerce language consistently
reported_outcomes: 2,200 UGC items reported
monthly search heat for 蝴蝶车 reported as 20x
seven-day e-commerce category number-one ranking reported
the report uses the wording 销量突破450万 for the first month; unit/meaning is ambiguous in the public report
portable_lessons: translate product structure into a visible scene problem before writing
a nickname is useful only when users understand and naturally reuse it

cases.name: AMIRO 人群产品分层与候选放大
production_mechanism: use search demand to identify unanswered brand-selection questions
separate hero products, life stages, and their primary messages
produce multiple content candidates
observe candidates through information-feed delivery
amplify promising content and occupy category/problem search terms
reported_outcomes: the report claims leading content/search penetration and strong e-commerce category ranking around the campaign
portable_lessons: different products and audiences should not share one broad poster message
candidate testing is more robust than committing to one concept

cases.name: 朴朴超市即时零售 KFS 项目
production_mechanism: combine internal sales, reputation, seasonality, product quality, platform heat, search, and competition for product selection
fix core audiences and regional delivery constraints in initial testing
match creator types and soft-integration formats to audience attention
use first image/title and early video frames as candidate first-screen variables
test on a small scale, review click/interaction/comments/region, then scale
use brand/category terms for defense and scene terms for expansion
reported_outcomes: city search indices reported as increasing 20% to 70%
more than half of notes reportedly had return-search rates above 1%, compared with the agency's stated 0.5% benchmark
NPS and product/search/sales outcomes were reported as improving
portable_lessons: link the sellable product and regional constraint to audience, scene, creator, content and search
treat project thresholds as local diagnostics, not universal rules

cases.name: 护肤内容有效与无效爆文对照
production_mechanism: compare public engagement with comment-topic relevance
distinguish brand/skin/problem discussion from attention centered on another product or creator appearance
review content fit, creator fit, and amplification together
reported_outcomes: one anonymous note's comments were reported as product/problem-relevant
another anonymous high-engagement note's comments were reported as attention leakage
portable_lessons: high interaction is not sufficient for commercial replication
comment semantics are an early diagnostic, not proof of conversion

cases.name: 家居内容载体与关系目标
production_mechanism: compare product-share, transformation, and useful-experience carriers
use clear object-first visuals for product selection
use visible before/process/after material and serialization for transformations
use seasonal questions and reusable answers for experience content
reported_outcomes: the article references 5.29 million home notes as the category universe
it describes a focused recent-30-day sample of 384 home notes with more than 10,000 likes and reports product-sharing among the top performers
creator interviews report high save/like potential but weaker creator memorability for some product-share formats
portable_lessons: carrier selection should follow the user's task and the account's relationship goal
save-friendly content can still be weak for creator differentiation

cases.name: 零食创作者真实使用表达
cases.brand: multiple creators and one interviewed brand manager
production_mechanism: show products held, opened, and in an appetizing state
use conversational first-person expression and specific pros and cons
reply to real user questions
evaluate creator tone and organic/commercial history for brand fit
reported_outcomes: one creator self-reported roughly 30-second video dwell versus roughly 10 seconds for an earlier format
portable_lessons: native-looking evidence comes from real use and specific judgment, not intentional ugliness
easy-to-copy no-face formats may generate notes without building durable creator memory

cases.name: 8840 篇素人内容复盘与伦理反例
cases.brand: five self-reported brand projects across four categories
production_mechanism: identify identical briefs, angles, photos, and AI rewrites as a failure pattern
shift toward customer scenes, user-mind words, search-question words, and prior account style
judge candidates using product-relevant questions, saves, and discussion rather than raw interaction alone
reported_outcomes: the author reports 8,840 notes across five brands and four categories over about five months
a community activity subset is reported as 5,438 notes at a very low average unit cost; incentives, authenticity, and denominator are not sufficiently clear
portable_lessons: batch uniformity is a production failure signal
tactic-level ethics review is required even when a source reports large volume
forbidden_tactics: using multiple IPs or small accounts to simulate independent users

cases.name: 匿名家居客户达人筛选
production_mechanism: review creator audience, content characteristics, prior brand collaborations, average interaction, commercial/organic history, and pricing
monitor content collection and aggregate reports
reported_outcomes: provider reports a 150% increase in its own explosive-note-rate metric and monitoring of 500 notes
confounders: creator, content, paid delivery, and selection changed together
portable_lessons: creator historical fit can be one production input
provider-specific explosive-rate claims must not become Skill thresholds

playbooks.name: 用户语言翻译器
playbooks.formula: product fact or parameter × frequent scene × visible user problem → a phrase users naturally say, search, and can verify
title_actions: lead with a recognizable user problem or job
use brand terminology only when the audience already understands it
cover_actions: show the visible problem or resulting state
limit cover copy to one audience and one problem
body_actions: who it does and does not fit
comment_actions: never seed a nickname through fake comments
failure_conditions: parameter replaced only with exaggerated adjectives
limitations: User language must be recollected for the current category and time window.

playbooks.name: 人群×状态痛点×产品×载体矩阵
playbooks.formula: one audience segment + one visible state + one matched answer + the carrier best able to show the evidence
title_actions: serve one audience/state per note
avoid all-user claims
cover_actions: make the state or result the first visual
do not stack every selling point on the cover
body_actions: provide the matching answer and limitations
use video only when action/process materially improves proof
comment_actions: tag real questions by audience and state for the next content cluster
limitations: Segmentation labels and product fit require current evidence; do not invent medical or performance claims.

playbooks.name: 首屏承诺一致性
playbooks.formula: title promise = cover or opening evidence = the job fulfilled immediately in the body
title_actions: keep one primary click reason
remove numbers/results that the body cannot prove
cover_actions: image supplies evidence and text supplies the reading task
video begins with the relevant scene/result rather than a brand intro
body_actions: answer why the note matters in the opening
follow with process, standard, or evidence
comment_actions: separate comments about the promised task from comments caused by unrelated attraction
primary_metrics: click or opening entry paired with continued reading
failure_conditions: title and body answer different questions
paid CTR treated as organic law
limitations: No exact first-screen duration or visual layout is universal.

playbooks.name: 多候选小测→相关性筛选→分面放大
playbooks.formula: produce comparable candidates for one content job, observe bounded natural/small-scale signals and target relevance, then decide recommendation and search amplification separately
title_actions: change and label one interpretable variable while keeping the content job stable
cover_actions: test information order or proof type without simultaneously changing audience, topic, creator, and body
body_actions: record which expression attracts which questions and searches
comment_actions: use real comment-topic relevance as one screen, not fake engagement
primary_metrics: stage-appropriate performance relative to account/category baseline
failure_conditions: scale based only on raw interaction
limitations: This is not a randomized A/B test unless assignment, timing, exposure, and variables are controlled.

playbooks.name: 有效爆文门
playbooks.formula: surface performance passes AND target semantics pass AND a relevant next behavior passes before replication or amplification
title_actions: do not copy a hook when its performance came from an irrelevant conflict, appearance, prize, or plot
cover_actions: audit whether the first visual centers the target problem/evidence or an unrelated attention source
body_actions: verify that major comments originate from claims actually supported in the body
comment_actions: code genuine questions and use them as future topics
do not manufacture relevance through seeded comments
failure_conditions: keyword hit treated as purchase proof
limitations: Comment semantics are a diagnostic proxy, not causal proof of conversion.

playbooks.name: 真实使用证据×有边界的不完美细节
playbooks.formula: real use relationship + visible process/condition + specific benefit + specific limitation → content that supports trust and judgment
title_actions: state a real task or bounded judgment
do not disguise commercial content as an invented passerby story
cover_actions: show the product in use, opened, worn, consumed, or in its real environment
do not force blur, low resolution, or deliberate clutter
comment_actions: answer real detail questions and preserve corrections
limitations: Native feel is category- and account-specific; it is not a fixed low-production aesthetic.

playbooks.name: 载体按任务选择
playbooks.formula: user job × available proof × account relationship goal → carrier
required_inputs: whether creator relationship is a goal
title_actions: list: decision task
transformation: constraint and change
how-to: executable result
story: conflict and turn with user value
cover_actions: how-to: step preview or result evidence
person/voice only when it improves trust or identity
comment_actions: ask for real missing cases or next samples, not generic engagement bait
primary_metrics: carrier-appropriate metric relative to account baseline
failure_conditions: all posts forced into PPT cards
all categories forced into handwritten notes
copying a high-like carrier without account fit
limitations: Historical category observations must be refreshed with current high/low samples.

playbooks.name: 搜索意图簇
playbooks.formula: brand/product/nickname terms capture existing awareness; category/problem/function/scene terms capture comparison and latent demand; one note answers one primary intent
required_inputs: evidence that can answer each query
title_actions: express one main question naturally
if the query asks how to choose, provide a decision standard rather than a slogan
cover_actions: show the answer form in search results: comparison, steps, result, scene, or product state
body_actions: expand evidence, limitations, and related questions
comment_actions: capture genuine new query language for future notes
failure_conditions: title does not answer the query
paid result treated as organic ranking law
limitations: Search language and result supply are time-sensitive and require recapture.

playbooks.name: 证据驱动选题会
playbooks.formula: prior high/low performance + current user search/comments + comparable supply → diagnose one funnel problem → assign one verifiable content job
title_actions: record the one hypothesis each title is testing
cover_actions: label whether the tested variable is information order, proof type, or visual object
body_actions: specify user job, evidence list, owner, and review point
separate replication candidates from innovation candidates
comment_actions: bring coded real questions, objections, and counterexamples into the next meeting
primary_metrics: one metric tied to the chosen surface/job
failure_conditions: fixed meeting cadence or innovation percentage treated as platform law
limitations: The workflow is supported by mixed evidence; each team's cadence and thresholds must be locally defined.

playbooks.name: 叙事轴心一致性检查
playbooks.formula: WHY value → HOW scene-based enactment → WHAT recognizable product or identity symbol
required_inputs: identity language users may choose to adopt
title_actions: complete a concrete user job first instead of writing an abstract value manifesto
cover_actions: allow different carriers while preserving recognizable people, scenes, judgments, or proof relationships
body_actions: let the product play a natural HOW or WHAT role
do not repeat the same brand line in every post
comment_actions: observe stable user associations without leading users to repeat a slogan
failure_conditions: all posts become identical brand posters
single-post likes used to validate long-term narrative
limitations: This is an account-consistency model, not a single-note traffic formula.

playbooks.name: 评论区真实需求反馈
playbooks.formula: genuine question/counterexample/use difference → public answer or added evidence → next topic and product feedback
title_actions: turn a frequent genuine question into a new title
do not claim everyone is asking when the question is fabricated or isolated
cover_actions: obtain necessary permission and de-identify quoted comments
never fabricate comment or chat screenshots
body_actions: answer, add conditions, disclose uncertainty, invite genuine counterexamples, and correct the original note when needed
comment_actions: ban seeded fake comments and sockpuppet interactions
failure_conditions: comment count treated as representative demand
limitations: Commenters are not necessarily representative of the full audience.

stage_metric_map.user_job: decide quickly whether the note is relevant
primary_metrics: click/opening entry paired with continued reading
stage_metric_map.common_misread: a beautiful cover or high click is treated as sufficient

stage_metric_map.user_job: decide whether the answer is credible
stage_metric_map.common_misread: length is treated as information density
all useful content is forced into generic PPT cards
keyword stacking or stale hot terms

stage_metric_map.user_job: decide whether the account remains useful or interesting
stage_metric_map.common_misread: single-post likes are optimized while the account remains interchangeable
irrelevant entertainment traffic is treated as effective seeding

hard_boundaries.rule: Do not fabricate first-person experience, user stories, tests, comments, chat logs, search data, or performance data.
hard_boundaries.reason: The production mechanism depends on authentic evidence and user language; fabrication creates false social proof and invalidates evaluation.

hard_boundaries.rule: Do not use fake comments, sockpuppets, coordinated IP/account patterns, or staged false controversy.
hard_boundaries.reason: These are manipulative tactics, not content-quality mechanisms; S06 is retained as a negative source example.

hard_boundaries.rule: Do not turn agency/service-provider thresholds into platform-wide constants.
hard_boundaries.reason: Category, account maturity, surface, budget, objective, and measurement all differ.

hard_boundaries.rule: Do not infer organic recommendation behavior from paid-project outcomes.
hard_boundaries.reason: Paid delivery, product, creator, search, campaign timing, and commerce execution are mixed interventions.

hard_boundaries.rule: Do not freeze one carrier or visual style into a universal native-aesthetic rule.
hard_boundaries.reason: Carrier effectiveness depends on task, evidence, category, account history, and relationship goal.

excluded_sources.reason: No named project, denominator, or outcome chain; retained only as a lead and not included in formulas.
Useful as generic management advice but not Xiaohongshu traffic evidence.
A course's existence or claimed number of cases does not expose the method or evidence.
Provenance and version cannot be verified.

unresolved_questions: Current 2026 baselines by category, account maturity, and distribution surface.
The separate contribution of content, product, paid media, commerce, and timing in public cases.
Causal visual-layout effects on click, reading, save, and follow.
The stable relationship among comment semantics, return search, and conversion.
Differences between new and mature accounts using the same carrier.
